entries.line: Coach exists in current v0 as a supported actor.
entries.rationale: Current v0 supports individual_user and coach only.

entries.line: Coach-facing execution is limited to current v0 execution boundaries: individual and coach_managed only.
entries.rationale: Current v0 allows only individual and coach_managed execution scopes.

entries.line: Coach-facing activity scope is limited to powerlifting, rugby_union, and general_strength only.
entries.rationale: Current v0 supports exactly three activities.

entries.line: Coach-facing runtime scope is limited to Phase 1-6 only; do not claim Phase 7 truth projection or Phase 8 evidence sealing.
entries.rationale: Phase 7 and Phase 8 are excluded from current v0 shipping.

entries.line: Coach may assign programs within current system limits.
entries.rationale: Coach assignment is in current v0 surface; assignment wording appears in coach-facing packaging.

entries.line: Coach may view factual execution artefacts for managed athletes within granted scope.
entries.rationale: Current v0 includes factual artefact viewing; coach visibility remains within granted relationship scope.

entries.line: Coach may write non-binding coach notes only.
entries.rationale: Coach notes are explicitly non-binding and non-executable.

entries.line: Coach may not override engine decisions, alter legality, alter Phase-1 declarations, trigger substitutions, trigger progression changes, or modify registries.
entries.rationale: Coach authority is observational only with hard non-authority boundaries.

entries.line: Coach-facing history in current v0 is factual and minimal; do not claim dashboards, analytics, rankings, messaging, or broad coaching intelligence.
entries.rationale: Current v0 surface is minimal; broader analytics/messaging capabilities are excluded.

entries.line: Coach-facing commercial / organisational powers described outside the active v0 scope are dormant and excluded unless a later build target activates them.
entries.rationale: Broader commercial/platform powers are dormant unless current build target activates them.

entries.line: Coach does not get evidence / replay access in current v0.
entries.rationale: Coach-facing packaging excludes evidence/replay access and current v0 excludes proof-layer surface.

entries.line: Organisation, team, unit, gym, and broader governance runtime are not part of the current v0 coach extract.
entries.rationale: Broader org/runtime structures are dormant or excluded from current v0 ship scope.
